queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of maintaining a checking account balance below zero on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical evidence regarding the association between the absence of a checking account and increased credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Installment rate as a percentage of disposable income.
queries.question: Analysis of installment rates as a percentage of disposable income as a mitigating factor in credit risk modeling.
